caption: A metallic piston with yellow and black diagonal caution stripes descends onto a light-colored, textured block against a solid black background. As the piston makes contact, the block is crushed, fracturing into several smaller, irregular pieces and emitting a cloud of fine white dust. Throughout the sequence, the piston continues its downward movement, further flattening the debris beneath it. The material under the piston transforms from a solid rectangular shape into a flattened heap of rubble and powder. No people, text, or logos are visible in the scene, which focuses entirely on the mechanical interaction between the metal cylinder and the brittle object.
